hero.headline: Implementation specialist who delivers seamless SaaS onboarding
hero.description: 20 enterprise SaaS rollouts across the UK, US, and Middle East. 5 years bridging business requirements and technical execution — onsite training, implementation support, and customer success. Expert at translating complex operational workflows into working system configurations.

experience.title: Lead, Product Implementation
bullets: Delivered 20 end-to-end enterprise SaaS implementations for mid-to-large clients — onsite training, configuration support, and post-go-live relationship management.
Conducted client workshops with executives and operational teams; facilitated requirements gathering and translated needs into working system configurations.
Provided comprehensive training sessions on platform functionality, configuration, and best practices — tailored to diverse user groups and learning styles.
Built strong client relationships as trusted advisor — gathering feedback, addressing concerns promptly, and driving continuous adoption improvements.

highlights.label: Onsite delivery excellence
highlights.text: Travelled onsite to Saudi Arabia for a half-million dollar engagement and to the UK for MHA — conducting stakeholder workshops, requirements gathering, and go-live training across multiple regions.

highlights.label: Customer success impact
highlights.text: 4 of 5 pilots converted to full-scale enterprise rollouts — through structured discovery, early value demonstration, and deep stakeholder alignment during implementation phase.

highlights.label: Implementation framework
highlights.text: Conceptualized a use-case-driven implementation methodology with complexity scoring and effort models — enabling accurate scoping, timeline calculation, and streamlined training delivery.

highlights.label: Training & adoption
highlights.text: Owned end-to-end client onboarding lifecycle — from initial workshops through post-implementation support. Worked cross-functionally to ensure smooth system adoption and operational workflow integration.

highlights.label: System integration expertise
highlights.text: Scoped and configured integrations across SSO (SAML/SCIM) and third-party platforms including Xero, CorrigoPro, Equiem, Wooqer, and Bill.com. Validated technical feasibility and authored integration requirement documents.

experience.title: Senior Catalog Specialist
bullets: Managed operational processes and resolved system defects for Amazon Fresh, Amazon Pantry, and Prime Now — directly improving efficiency and user experience.
Designed process improvement frameworks using data analysis and prioritisation models — yielding an estimated $230K in monthly operational savings.
Streamlined workflows by identifying procedural gaps and standardizing operations — reducing invalid assignments between support teams by ~50 per day.

customSections.title: Implementation Domain Expertise
items: Enterprise SaaS platform configuration and customization
Integration with third-party systems: Xero, CorrigoPro, Equiem, Wooqer, Bill.com
SSO and SCIM authentication setup and validation
Multi-tenant system architecture and workflow design
API feasibility assessment via Postman and vendor documentation
